====== Gearbox Game Mechanics ======

===== Variables =====

==== Sliders ====

^ Variable ^ Description ^ ^ Variable ^ Description ^
| **Sliders_LowGear_Ratio** | Sliders: Specifications => Low-End Gearing | | **Sliders_HighGear_Ratio** | Sliders: Specifications => High-End Gearing |
| **Sliders_Torque_Max_Input** | Sliders: Specifications => Maximum Torque Input | | **Sliders_Tech_Material** | Sliders: Technologies => Material Quality |
| **Sliders_Tech_Components** | Sliders: Technologies => Component Quality | | **Sliders_Tech_Technology** | Sliders: Technologies => Technology |
| **Sliders_Tech_Techniques** | Sliders: Technologies => Manufacturing Techniques | | **Sliders_Design_Ease** | Sliders: Design Focus => Shifting Ease |
| **Sliders_Design_Dependability** | Sliders: Design Focus => Dependability | | **Sliders_Design_DesignPace** | Sliders: Design Focus => Development Pace |
| **Sliders_Design_FuelEconomy** | Sliders: Design Focus => Fuel Economy | | **Sliders_Design_Performance** | Sliders: Design Focus => Performance |

===== Ratings =====

==== Fuel Rating ====

<code cpp>
Fuel_Rating = 100 - (20 * Sliders_Design_FuelEconomy)
</code>

==== Maximum Torque Support ====

<code cpp>
Max_Torque_Support = 10 * Number_Of_Gears + 75 * Sliders_Torque_Max_Input
</code>
